query: Set up a reusable PM context router for this delivery workspace so the team can switch between projects without re-explaining tools, sources, and active context.
Create .agents/project-context.md for this repo, treat it as the workspace router, and ask me only for the missing essentials.
We just kicked off a new project called Sidebench Demo. Create a project-specific context pack with tools, sources, and working memory, and wire it into the workspace context.
Update the project context with the latest blockers and tool access notes, but if there are multiple projects in flow-projects ask me which one first.
Before we continue delivery, create the project context for client-b and make sure future PM skills know where to look for Jira, GitHub, and source docs.
Help me write a Python function to parse a CSV of transactions.
Summarize this single markdown file in three bullets.
Fix this React button style regression in mobile view.
Generate release notes from git commits for this week.
Set up CI for running tests on pull requests.
